title: Rubroshorea ferruginea
taxonomy: Rubroshorea ferruginea is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This family is part of the larger clade of asterids, which also includes the Ericales and Cornales orders. The Rubiaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, and Rubroshorea ferruginea is classified within one of these subfamilies. The classification of Rubroshorea ferruginea is still being researched, and it is possible that its classification may be revised as new information becomes available. The species is likely to be further classified within the Rubioideae subfamily, which is the largest subfamily within the Rubiaceae family.
